fact_nuggets.text: Surge Surfer (Japanese: Surf Tail) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Alolan Raichu.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When the battlefield is under the effects of Electric Terrain , Surge Surfer doubles the Speed of Pokemon with this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Surge Surfer has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] When the battlefield is under the effects of Electric Terrain , Surge Surfer doubles the Speed of Pokemon with this Ability.
Doubles this Pokemon's Speed on Electric Terrain.
